gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the repository's front page its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page current with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (representing the automated bot) updating a giant pixelated notice board or scrolling parchment, with the bee mascot watching approvingly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a new pixelated paper to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a new pixelated paper to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack.
